sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ أَنْ تَأْكُلَ فِي الْهَوَاءِ الطَّلْقِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je odlučila jesti na otvorenom.
sentences.translationEn: The family decided to eat in the open air.

sentences.translation: Odnijeli su hranu u obližnji park.
sentences.translationEn: They took the food to the nearby park.

sentences.translation: Prostrijeli su tepih na travi i sjeli.
sentences.translationEn: They spread a mat on the grass and sat down.

sentences.translation: Jeli su i uživali u prirodi oko sebe.
sentences.translationEn: They ate and enjoyed the nature around them.
